onboarding.step1Description: The first Arabic AI marketing platform. 9 smart studios to help you create professional content in minutes.
onboarding.step2Description: Add your logo, colors, and fonts. We'll use them automatically in everything you create — no need to re-enter them each time.
onboarding.step3Description: Try the Image Creator — write a simple description in Arabic or English and see the result. First generation is free!
onboarding.step4Description: Start free with 25 credits per month, or upgrade to a larger plan based on your needs. You can upgrade anytime.
onboarding.step5Description: Thanks for completing onboarding — we added 5 free credits to your account. Start creating now!

pillars.title: Why PyraSuite?
pillars.subtitle: Because you deserve a tool designed for you — not translated for you
pillars.p1Desc: Instead of paying for 5 different tools — it's all here: images, campaigns, plans, analytics, voice, and editing. Pyra runs everything behind the scenes.
pillars.p2Desc: Not a translation. Not a retrofit. Built in Arabic from the first line of code. It understands your dialect, writes in your style, and creates content that never feels AI-made.
pillars.p3Title: Pay only for what you use
pillars.p3Desc: A transparent credit system — know the cost before you click. An image = 1 credit, a full campaign = 12. No surprises, no hidden fees.
pillars.p4Title: From idea to publish in minutes
pillars.p4Desc: Write your idea in one line — Pyra turns it into a ready-to-post campaign with images, captions, and hashtags. A full week's work, done in 10 minutes.

footer.tagline1: Powered by the Pyra AI engine 🦊
footer.tagline2: Write in Arabic. Pyra makes it happen.
footer.poweredBy: Powered by Pyra AI 🦊 — Built by Pyramedia

studios.s8Desc: Remove backgrounds, change colors, add text, swap styles — with one command

social.card1Title: From idea to full campaign in minutes

social.card2Title: Arabic first — interface, dialect, and understanding
social.card2Desc: Write in Gulf, Egyptian, Levantine, or Modern Standard Arabic — Pyra gets the context and creates content that sounds natural.
social.card3Desc: Images, campaigns, plans, competitor analysis, voiceovers, and more — all in one place with a transparent credit system.
social.trust: Cloud infrastructure built for marketing agencies, startups, and independent marketers — speed and reliability you can count on.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start
faq.a1: Pyra AI is the intelligence engine that powers all nine studios in PyraSuite. It understands your request in Arabic and turns it into professional results — images, campaigns, plans, analyses, and voiceovers.
faq.q2: How does the credit system work?
faq.a2: Every action has a clear cost you see before you click. One image = 1 credit, a full 9-post campaign = 12 credits. No surprises. You start with 25 free credits.
faq.q3: Can I try it without paying?
faq.a3: Absolutely! Create a free account and get 25 credits on us — enough to try all nine studios and see the results for yourself.
faq.q4: Does Pyra AI really understand Arabic?
faq.a4: It doesn't just understand it — it's built Arabic-first. Write in Gulf, Egyptian, Levantine, or Modern Standard Arabic. Pyra AI gets the context and creates content that sounds natural, not translated.
faq.a5: Monthly subscription credits renew every month. Top-up credits stay valid for 12 months — buy them and use them at your own pace.
faq.q6: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.a6: You can top up extra credits anytime without changing your plan. Or upgrade to a bigger plan — one click from the billing page.
faq.a7: Anytime. No contracts, no commitments, no questions asked. Cancel from the billing page and you're done.
faq.a8: Yes — the interface is available in both Arabic and English. But the real strength is that Pyra AI is designed Arabic-first, not translated from English.

cta.title: Tell Pyra what you want — she'll handle the rest
cta.subtitle: 25 free credits are waiting for you. No credit card required. Sign up in seconds and launch your first campaign.
